data.name: Hentai Clicker: Reika is streaming
data.detailed_description:
🎮 Welcome to Hentai Clicker: Reika is Streaming

Enter a world of allure and excitement, where Reika, the charming idol, answers your every click. Collect hearts, unlock new outfits, and dive into an interactive experience filled with surprises!

🍑 About the Game

Immerse yourself in an enchanting universe where every click brings you closer to Reika’s playful secrets. Collect hearts to progress through captivating stages while unlocking exciting outfits and rewards. Upgrade your skills to collect hearts faster and achieve your goals.

🎉 Features

  • 🎨 Stunning Anime-Style Graphics: Enjoy beautifully drawn visuals that bring Reika to life.

  • 🔞 Explicit Content: Discover uncensored scenes.

  • 🎯 Motivating Goals: Unlock new stages and outfits, from the classic idol look to the most daring designs.

  • 🖱️ Addictive Clicker Gameplay: Simple and fun mechanics that will keep you clicking non-stop.

  • 💪 Skill Upgrades: Boost your heart collection speed from “Basic” to “Eternal.”

  • 👗 Varied Wardrobe: Unlock a multitude of outfits.

  • 🔥 Interactive Experience: Enjoy voice acting and dialogues that evolve with your progress, plus extra content.

💖 Why You’ll Love It

Hentai Clicker: Reika is Streaming offers more than just a game—it’s an immersive experience. Let yourself be captivated by the visuals, the satisfying clicker gameplay, or Reika’s irresistible personality.

🎮 How to Play

  • 🖱️ Click to Collect Hearts: The more you click, the more hearts you earn!

  • 🔓 Unlock New Stages: Use hearts to reveal Reika’s outfits and secret scenes.

  • 🚀 Upgrade Your Skills: Invest in enhancements to speed up heart collection and progress faster.

🎉 Join the Adventure!

Ready to dive in? Start playing Hentai Clicker: Reika is Streaming now and uncover all the secrets waiting to be revealed!

data.short_description: 🔞Step into a world of playful discovery with Hentai Clicker: Reika is Streaming!❤️ Collect hearts, unlock daring outfits, and upgrade abilities in this addictive clicker game. Enjoy stunning anime visuals, explicit content, and interactive voice acting for a truly immersive experience.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 德文, 韓文, 日文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 ou équivalent
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Carte intégrée (Intel HD Graphics 3000)
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 ou équivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 560
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon and Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.11
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon and Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Carte intégrée (Intel HD Graphics 3000)
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 560
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
